story.text:
# 📄 Privacy Value Model V6
**document** · shared · knowledge

The gathering turn and the moving ceiling. R(t) and the shelf life t*, the exponential-to-linear leakage gap (C83), the Existence-Leak law (C81, 70%), the ARCH-1 bridge (C85), obstruction amnesia (C86), the Key as accumulator (C87). Run 8 added the Limitative Reading: Gödel ↔ Φ_agent (C91), Tarski ↔ Φ_inference (C92), the inversion (C90), content-addressed liveness (C93). Register head C93.

## Edges out

- *references* → [[C90 · The Limitative Inversion]]
- *references* → [[C91 · Gödel ↔ Φ_agent]]
- *references* → [[C92 · Tarski ↔ Φ_inference]]
- *references* → [[C93 · Content-Addressed Liveness Leak]]
- *defines* → [[Three-Axis Separation]]
